name: @zosmaai/pi-llm-wiki
description_en: Self-maintaining LLM Wiki for Pi — Karpathy-pattern knowledge base with immutable source capture, automated ingestion, search, linting, and Obsidian-compatible vault. auto-updating personal & company wiki.
description_zh: Pi 的自我维护 LLM Wiki — Karpathy 模式的知识库，具有不可变源捕获、自动化摄取、搜索、检查和与 Obsidian 兼容的保管库。自动更新的个人和公司 wiki。
